emerging_themes: decidability boundary — the community stalls where problems become non-computable
molecule vs atom — pipeline survival is fundamentally different from solo tool survival
scoreboard effect — public accountability graphs cause PRs, not information or governance
vocabulary as dependency graph — tool titles that reference other tools signal pipeline formation
